container.title: Part B. Applied studies
Coursework pathway
container.description:
You must complete BRM5022 and a further 24 credit points from the following list of units.

Note 1: In order to be eligible for the industry placement unit, you need to have an average of at least 70% in your core biotechnology studies (Part A). If you do not meet this requirement, then you can undertake 48 credit points from the elective list or you may exit and graduate with a Graduate Diploma of Biotechnology.

Note 2: You must have a successful application with an organisation to undertake BRM5022. Training on how to write a CV and to prepare for an interview is available and you will be provided with a list of positions to apply for.

relationship.academic_item_name: Fundamentals of addiction science and addiction policy
Startup fundamentals: From setting up to securing investment
Value creation and start-up capital optimisation for founders
Ethics, good research practice and practical research methods

relationship.abbr_name: SCREEN ASSESS BRIEF INTERVEN ADDIC BEHAV
relationship.academic_item_name: Screening, assessment and brief interventions for addictive behaviours

parent_record.value: Curriculum Structure Container: Part B. Applied studies

container.title: Research pathway
container.description:
Note 1: In order to be eligible for the research project, you need to have an average of at least 70% in your core biotechnology studies (Part A). If you do not meet this requirement, then you can undertake 48 credit points from the elective list or you may exit and graduate with a Graduate Diploma of Biotechnology.

Note 2: You must have a successful application with a research group to undertake this unit. You will be provided with a list of projects to apply for.
